articles.description: Chelsea have been handed a £10.75m fine after breaching Premier League rules over financial reporting, third-party investment and youth development.
articles.title: Chelsea fined £10.75m for breaching Premier League rules

articles.description: Liam Livingstone issues strong criticism of the England set-up, saying there “wasn’t any part of me” that wanted to be part of the team that reached the semi-finals of the T20 World Cup.
articles.title: Liam Livingstone criticises England, Rob Key and Brendon McCullum

articles.description: Former Wales captain Sam Warburton and former Scotland skipper John Barclay discuss their Six Nations teams of the tournament.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: BBC pundits team of the tournament

articles.description: Golf already has four majors and does not need a fifth one, especially given three are already played in the United States, writes Iain Carter.
articles.title: The Players Championship is 'special but not likely to become fifth major'

articles.description: Manchester United have no plans to revise their decision not to offer a new deal to Casemiro, even though the Brazilian has excelled in midfield recently.
articles.title: Casemiro: Man Utd have no plans for U-turn and new contract for Brazilian

articles.description: Kylian Mbappe and Jude Bellingham return to Real Madrid's squad after injury for their Champions League last-16 match at Manchester City on Tuesday.
articles.title: Champions League: Jude Bellingham and Kylian Mbappe return to Real Madrid squad for Man City trip

articles.description: Joan Laporta vows Barcelona will be "unstoppable" as he is re-elected club president for a further five years.
articles.title: Joan Laporta re-elected Barcelona president, beating Victor Font

articles.description: Six of France 10 professional-era title wins in the Five and Six Nations have come in tournaments directly after British and Irish Lions tours. Is it a coincidence?
articles.title: Six Nations: Does British and Irish Lions hangover help France?

articles.description: Ronnie O'Sullivan says restoring his game to its previous level would be bigger than winning world titles.
articles.title: Ronnie O'Sullivan says return to form would be greatest achievement after World Open win

articles.description: Liverpool have been here far too often this season. Another late, late goal costing them points as they drew 1-1 with struggling Tottenham.
articles.title: Liverpool concede late again: 'Wake up... or be happy with Conference League'
